name: jiangyue-website-planner
description: Codex skill plugin for Jiangyue website page strategy, B2B messaging, SEO/AEO planning, CTA logic, claim boundaries, and image role briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Lock Jiangyue page strategy and image roles.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for locking WordPress/Gutenberg page objectives, buyer intent, SEO/AEO direction, CTA path, claim boundaries, attention hierarchy, and strategy-only image briefs.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-planner to plan a Jiangyue website page before creating assets.
Use $jiangyue-website-planner to turn a rough page idea into a B2B page brief and image request brief.
Use $jiangyue-website-planner to review customer or image feedback when page strategy may be the cause.
